Aaron Brooks

Aaron Jamal Brooks

Position: Point Guard ▪ Shoots: Right

6-0, 161lb (183cm, 73kg)

Born: January 14, 1985 (Age: 41-180d) in Seattle, Washington us

College: Oregon

High School: Franklin in Seattle, Washington

Recruiting Rank: 2003 (32)

Draft: Houston Rockets, 1st round (26th pick, 26th overall), 2007 NBA Draft

NBA Debut: November 17, 2007

Career Length: 10 years

Transactions

June 28, 2007: Drafted by the Houston Rockets in the 1st round (26th pick) of the 2007 NBA Draft.

December 6, 2007: Assigned to the Rio Grande Valley Vipers of the G-League.

December 14, 2007: Recalled from the Rio Grande Valley Vipers of the G-League.

February 24, 2011: Traded by the Houston Rockets to the Phoenix Suns for Goran Dragić and a 2011 1st round draft pick (Nikola Mirotić was later selected).

July 16, 2012: Signed as a free agent with the Sacramento Kings.

March 1, 2013: Waived by the Sacramento Kings.

March 5, 2013: Signed as a free agent with the Houston Rockets.

June 30, 2013: Waived by the Houston Rockets.

July 19, 2013: Signed as a free agent with the Houston Rockets.

February 20, 2014: Traded by the Houston Rockets to the Denver Nuggets for Jordan Hamilton.

July 22, 2014: Signed a contract with the Chicago Bulls.

July 14, 2015: Signed a contract with the Chicago Bulls.

July 21, 2016: Signed a contract with the Indiana Pacers.

September 21, 2017: Signed a contract with the Minnesota Timberwolves.

Frequently Asked Questions

How old is Aaron Brooks?

Aaron Brooks is 41 years old.

Where was Aaron Brooks born?

Aaron Brooks was born in Seattle, Washington.

When was Aaron Brooks born?

Aaron Brooks was born on January 14, 1985.

How tall is Aaron Brooks?

Aaron Brooks is 6-0 (183 cm) tall.

How much did Aaron Brooks weigh when playing?

Aaron Brooks weighed 161 lbs (73 kg) when playing.

Is Aaron Brooks in the Hall of Fame?

Aaron Brooks is not in the Hall of Fame.

When was Aaron Brooks drafted?

Aaron Brooks was drafted by Houston Rockets, 1st round (26th pick, 26th overall), 2007 NBA Draft.

What position did Aaron Brooks play?

Point Guard.

When did Aaron Brooks retire?

Aaron Brooks last played in 2018.

What is Aaron Brooks' net worth?

Aaron Brooks made at least $20,144,233 playing professional basketball.

How much did Aaron Brooks make?

Aaron Brooks made $3,396,250 in 2014.

What did Aaron Brooks average?

Aaron Brooks averaged 9.7 points, 1.7 rebounds, and 3.0 assists per game.

How many rings does Aaron Brooks have?

Aaron Brooks won 0 championships.

What schools did Aaron Brooks attend?

Aaron Brooks attended Franklin in Seattle, Washington and Oregon.
